name: atropos
description: Atropos — read-only supersession consistency verifier over CURRENT-AUTHORITY#superseded (never mutates; never imports clotho/).

scripts.check: node --check verify.mjs && node --check scripts/test-verify.mjs && node --check scripts/test-readonly.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && node scripts/test-verify.mjs && node scripts/test-readonly.mjs
